name: Free Enterprise Fund v. Public Company Accounting Oversight Board
summary: Struck down dual for-cause removal protections as unconstitutional while unanimously accepting that a single layer of for-cause removal protection for the SEC commissioners was permissible.
significance: Cited for its holding that dual layers of for-cause removal were unconstitutional, its severability approach of excising only the removal restriction, and its statement about not deciding the status of lesser functionaries.
